fix.text: Autocomplete, Box, Button, Card, MenuItem, Stack, TextField

.string()
    .nullable()
    .optional()
    .or(
      zod
        .literal('')
        .refine((val) => !val || /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(val), {
          message: 'Parent Email must be valid.',
        })
